name: Carnitas
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds bone-in pork shoulder or pork butt
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pork, broth, onion, coriander, cumin, oregano, chilies if using,
and bay leaves in a 5- to 6-quart pan. Add enough water to just cover the
meat. Cover the pan and bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer until meat
pulls apart easily with a fork (3 to 4 hours).
2. Lift out our meat (reserve broth for other uses, if desired). Discard fat.
Place pork in a large roasting pan and bake, uncovered, in an oven set to
450° until sizzling and browned (about 20 minutes). Pull off chunks of meat
and shred with 2 forks, discarding fat.
